displayTitle: Dark Empire #4: Confrontation on the Smugglers' Moon
synopsis: Betrayed by their friends and pursued by everyone's favorite bounty hunter, Han and Leia try to escape from Nar Shaddaa. Meanwhile, the Rebels in combat over the planet Calamari receive aid from an unexpected source, and Luke falls deeper into the grip of the Dark Side!
title: Dark Empire #4: Confrontation on the Smugglers' Moon
